name: Dragonplate
description:
This suit of +2 greater resilient dragonhide full plate makes you look like a fearsome dragon. The armor comes in many different varieties depending on the type of dragon from which it's made, though they usually conform to the four magical traditions.

Activate—Dragon Breath 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You unleash a of energy with a damage type and saving throw corresponding to the tradition of the dragon used to make the armor (shown on the table below). The cone deals 14d6 damage; each creature in the area must attempt a DC 36 basic saving throw.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include 1,250 gp of dragonhide.

Dragon TraditionDamage
Arcane|options:area-damage]{Force} (Reflex)
Divine|options:area-damage]{Spirit} (Reflex)
Occult|options:area-damage]{Mental} (Will)
Primal|options:area-damage]{Poison} (Fortitude)
